summary: Frontend testing completed for Data Explorer page (Tableau-style drag & drop interface). All core features working: Fields panel shows datasets with expandable columns, drag & drop fields to Rows/Values drop zones, chart generation, 5 chart types (Bar/Line/Area/Pie/Scatter), 5 aggregation methods (Sum/Avg/Count/Min/Max), Save Chart functionality saves to Charts page, sidebar navigation includes Data Explorer under Visualize menu.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - appears during chart render transition, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Line 94-122: DraggableField component properly uses react-dnd useDrag hook
Line 125-189: DropZone component with proper canDrop logic for dimension/measure validation
Line 192-312: ChartPreview component supports all 5 chart types with Recharts
Line 410-502: generateChart function correctly fetches dataset data and applies aggregation
Line 506-531: saveChart function posts to /api/charts endpoint
Line 535-541: clearAll function properly resets all state
Line 87-88: DashboardLayout.jsx correctly includes Data Explorer in NAVIGATION under Visualize

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all Data Explorer features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Explorer page fully tested. Drag & drop uses react-dnd with HTML5Backend. Fields panel shows datasets from /api/datasets endpoint. Chart generation fetches data from /api/datasets/{id}/data. Save Chart posts to /api/charts. All 5 chart types (bar/line/area/pie/scatter) and 5 aggregations (sum/avg/count/min/max) working. Chart title input allows custom naming.
mocked_apis: None - all features use real endpoints
